_instructions: Ye aapka posting schedule hai. Har din ke liye ek entry banayein. 'time' 24-hour format mein UTC hai. 'caption' agar khali chorden ge to AI khud topic se caption bana dega. Jab schedule khatam hoga (last entry ke baad), system automatically WAPAS DAY 1 se shuru kar dega (loop). Naya month dena ho to bas is list mein nayi entries add/replace kar dein.

posts.topic: Motivational quote about hard work and success
posts.image_prompt: inspirational sunrise over mountains, motivational quote style, vibrant colors
modern clean flat lay business desk, minimal aesthetic

posts.topic: Fun fact related to our niche
posts.image_prompt: colorful infographic style illustration, fun fact concept
